decisions_made: FloatingWindow removed entirely — SimulationHUD and ControlsPanel were dead code (not imported anywhere), so all three deleted rather than migrated
Plan renumbered: old Step 14 (SimulationHUD) removed, old Step 15 (DebugPanel+ControlsPanel) → new Step 14 (DebugPanel only), steps 16-18 → 15-17
FloatingWindow.ts survived Step 4 commit because its callers still compiled; both deleted together in the follow-up cleanup commit
index.html was malformed (duplicate </body></html> with both main.ts and home.ts scripts) — fixed to single mount #landing-root + /src/home.tsx
LandingPage renders INTO #landing-root (Preact pattern); component itself renders <div id=landing> as its root so CSS #landing selector still applies
CSS variables are CSS custom properties — no Sass additionalData injection needed; components use var() directly
gameSignals.ts created with 16 typed signals covering speed, fuel, heading, vel, system, elapsed, progress, fps, star counts — not yet wired to game loop (wired in Step 17)
next_action: Run /step to implement Step 5: convert src/ui/cockpit/StatusPanel.ts → StatusPanel.tsx with three canvas useRefs, drawGauge verbatim, useImperativeHandle exposing draw(), mountStatusPanel() helper; update CockpitHUD.ts to call mountStatusPanel(); move _status.scss to StatusPanel.scss.
